name: rattle-ai-workspace
description: AI-native workspace for the Rattle product configurator (rattleapp.de). Bundles 8 skills (configurator, api, pricelist-analysis, suggest-config, document-templates, apply-config, audit, tenant-memory), 3 subagents, 4 slash commands, JSON Schemas for every output contract, and golden I/O examples. Encodes the #1 rule (explicit options for ALL variants), 12 configuration rules, 4 anti-patterns, 6 structural checks, and 7 idempotent ensure_* operation types so any AI model can produce, audit, and apply correct, BOM-aware Rattle configurations.
